root_causes.root_cause: upsertPhotosForModel payload included {id: undefined} — postgrest-js puts 'id' in ?columns= URL param via Object.keys(), but JSON.stringify strips the undefined value from body, causing PostgREST column/body mismatch → 400
root_causes.fix: Conditionally include id key only when defined; improved error logging

root_causes.summary: Current Location field misleading in agency UI
root_causes.root_cause: ModelEditDetailsPanel showed a 'Current Location' TextInput bound to models.current_location (legacy text column), which is separate from model_locations (Near Me). Field was never populated in add-flow, appeared empty after reopen, creating false impression of persistence failure
root_causes.fix: Removed the Current Location TextInput from agency edit panel (SAFE-A)

root_causes.root_cause: RPC is RETURNS SETOF. .maybeSingle() sends Accept: vnd.pgrst.object+json header. PostgREST returns 406 when 0 rows match (cannot represent empty set as single object). Normal for new model creation with no email match.
root_causes.fix: Replaced .maybeSingle() with array handling ([0] ?? null) at both callsites
